        · by_cases hk : k % 2 = 0 <;> simp [hk]
          · rwa [← Nat.div_add_mod k 2, hk, add_zero]
          · rwa [← Nat.div_add_mod k 2, Nat.mod_two_of_ne_zero hk, add_comm]
       ))]
      convert card_filter_piFinset_eq_multinomial A w hw.1.1
      ext f
      simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset]
      apply forall_congr'
      intro i
      congr 1
      simp only [key, e, comp_apply, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft'_apply, Equiv.symm_symm,
        Equiv.piCurry_symm_apply, finProdFinEquiv_symm_apply]
      rw [← card_disjoint_union]
      refine card_congr (Equiv.sumEquivSigmaBool _).symm (by simp) (by simp) fun _ _ ↦ id

let e : (Fin (2 * m) → ι) ≃ (Fin m → ι × ι) :=
        (Equiv.piCongrLeft' ι finSumFinEquiv).trans <|
        (Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow _ _ _).trans <|
        (Equiv.piProd _ _ _).symm
      rw [Finset.sum_equiv e]
      · intro f
        simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product, e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piProd_symm_apply,
          Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft'_apply, Fin.forall_iff,
          Sum.forall, forall_and]
        rfl
      · intro f hf
        congr 1
        congr! 2 with i
        simp only [e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piProd_symm_apply,
          Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft'_apply]
        rw [← card_sum, ← Fintype.card_sum]
        exact Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.sumCongr (Equiv.refl _) (Equiv.refl _)).symm
      rw [Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun f i ↦ #{k | f k = i}) _]
      · refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
        simp only [mem_filter, mem_piAntidiag] at hw
        rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
        congr 1
        convert card_filter_piFinset_const_eq_multinomial A w hw.1.2 using 2
        ext f
        simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset]
        tauto
      · intro f hf
        simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset] at hf
        simp only [mem_filter, mem_piAntidiag]
        refine ⟨⟨?_, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
        · intro i hi
          rw [mem_support_iff, ne_eq, not_not] at hi
          exact hf.1 _ (Set.mem_of_mem_filter hi)
        · rw [card_eq_sum_ones, sum_boole, Fintype.card_fin]
        · exact hf.2

let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
        (Equiv.arrowProdEquivProdArrow _ _ _).trans <|
        (Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow _ _ _).symm.trans <|
        Equiv.piCongrLeft' _ (finSumFinEquiv (n := m) (m := m))
      have h_count (I : Fin m → ι × ι) (i : ι) :
          #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i} = #{k | e I k = i} := by
        simp only [e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.arrowProdEquivProdArrow_apply,
          Equiv.symm_trans_apply, Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_symm_apply,
          Equiv.piCongrLeft'_apply, finSumFinEquiv_apply_left, finSumFinEquiv_apply_right,
          Sum.elim_inl, Sum.elim_inr]
        rw [← card_sum, ← card_map (Embedding.inl _), ← card_map (Embedding.inr _), ← filter_or]
        · congr with k; cases k <;> simp
        · rintro _ _ h _ rfl; simp at h
      rw [← (e.map_piFinset_const (fun _ ↦ A)).symm.sum_comp]
      simp_rw [Function.comp, h_count]
      rw [Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun f ↦ fun i ↦ #{k | f k = i}) _]
      · congr 1
        ext w
        simp only [mem_filter, mem_piAntidiag, and_congr_right_iff]
        intro hw
        rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
        congr 1
        rw [← card_filter_piFinset_eq_multinomial A _ w hw]
        congr with f
        simp [funext_iff, eq_comm]
      · intro f _
        rw [mem_piAntidiag]
        exact Fintype.card_fin _

let key (I : Fin m → ι × ι) (i : ι) := #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i}
      rw [← Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to key]
      · congr with w
        rw [sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
        congr 1
        -- Combinatorial step: The number of I with key I = w is multinomial A w
        let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
          (Equiv.piCongrRight fun _ ↦ Equiv.piFinTwo _).trans <| (Equiv.uncurry _ _).trans <|
          (Equiv.prodComm _ _).arrowCongr (Equiv.refl _) |>.trans <|
          (finTwoMulEquiv m).arrowCongr (Equiv.refl _)
        rw [← card_piFinset_const_count_eq_multinomial A _ _ (mem_piAntidiag.1 w)]
        refine Finset.card_congr (fun I _ ↦ e I) (fun I hI ↦ ?_) e.injective (fun J hJ ↦ ?_)
        · simp_rw [mem_filter, mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hI ⊢
          refine ⟨fun k ↦ by simp [e]; split_ifs <;> exact (hI.1 _).1 <|> exact (hI.1 _).2, fun i ↦ ?_⟩
          rw [hI.2, key, count_eq_card_filter_eq, card_eq_sum_ones, sum_filter, sum_filter]
          simp only [e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.arrowCongr_apply, Equiv.piCongrRight_apply,
            Equiv.piFinTwo_apply, Equiv.uncurry_apply, Equiv.prodComm_apply, finTwoMulEquiv_apply,
            Equiv.refl_apply]
          rw [← (finTwoMulEquiv m).sum_comp]; simp [sum_add_distrib]; rfl
        · simp_rw [mem_filter, mem_piFinset] at hJ ⊢
          refine ⟨e.symm J, ?_, by simp⟩
          simp_rw [mem_product, key]
          refine ⟨fun k ↦ ?_, fun i ↦ ?_⟩
          · have := hJ.1 (e (e.symm J) k); simpa [e] using this
          · rw [← hJ.2 i, count_eq_card_filter_eq, card_eq_sum_ones, sum_filter, sum_filter]
            simp only [e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.arrowCongr_apply, Equiv.piCongrRight_apply,
              Equiv.piFinTwo_apply, Equiv.uncurry_apply, Equiv.prodComm_apply, finTwoMulEquiv_apply,
              Equiv.refl_apply]
            rw [← (finTwoMulEquiv m).sum_comp]; simp [sum_add_distrib]; rfl
      · intro I hI
        simp_rw [mem_filter, mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hI
        refine mem_piAntidiag.2 ⟨fun i hi ↦ ?_, ?_⟩
        · rw [key] at hi; contrapose! hi
          simp only [key, eq_zero_add, card_eq_zero, filter_eq_empty_iff, not_mem_filter]
          intro k; constructor <;> intro h <;> apply hi <;> exact (hI k).1 <|> exact (hI k).2
        · simp only [key, sum_add_distrib, ← sum_card_fiberwise]; rfl

let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
        Equiv.trans (Equiv.piCongrRight (fun _ ↦ Equiv.finTwoArrow.symm))
        (Equiv.trans Equiv.piCurry (Equiv.piCongrLeft' (finProdFinEquiv m 2).symm))
      rw [Finset.sum_bij (fun I _ ↦ e I) (fun J _ ↦ e.symm J)]
      · intro I hI
        simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hI ⊢
        simp only [e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piCongrRight_apply, Equiv.finTwoArrow_symm_apply,
          Equiv.piCurry_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft'_apply]
        constructor
        · intro x; obtain ⟨k, b⟩ := (finProdFinEquiv m 2).symm x
          fin_cases b <;> simpa using hI.1 k
        · intro i hi; convert hI.2 i hi using 1
          rw [← card_congr (λ k _ ↦ (finProdFinEquiv m 2) k) (by simp) (by simp) (by intro _ _; simp)]
          simp; rfl
      · intro J hJ
        simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hJ ⊢
        simp only [e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piCongrRight_apply, Equiv.finTwoArrow_symm_apply,
          Equiv.piCurry_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft'_apply]
        constructor
        · intro k; constructor <;> apply hJ.1
        · intro i hi; convert hJ.2 i hi using 1
          rw [card_congr (λ k _ ↦ (finProdFinEquiv m 2) k) (by simp) (by simp) (by intro _ _; simp)]
          simp; rfl
      · intro; simp
      · intro; simp
      · intro I hI
        congr 1; refine Finset.prod_congr rfl fun i _ ↦ ?_
        congr 1
        rw [← card_congr (λ k _ ↦ (finProdFinEquiv m 2) k) (by simp) (by simp) (by intro _ _; simp)]
        simp [e]; rfl
      rw [← Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun J ↦ count J) _]
      · refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
        rw [Finset.sum_const, card_filter_count_eq_multinomial]
        exact (mem_piAntidiag.1 hw).2
        exact (mem_piAntidiag.1 hw).1
      · intro J hJ
        simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset] at hJ
        rw [mem_filter, mem_piAntidiag]
        refine ⟨⟨?_, hJ.1⟩, hJ.2⟩
        rw [sum_count_eq_card_filter_mem]
        simp

let ψ (I : Fin m → ι × ι) (i : ι) := #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i}
      rw [← sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun I ↦ ψ I) (A ×ˢ A ^^ m)]
      · refine sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
        rw [sum_filter, sum_filter]
        split_ifs with h_even
        · rw [sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
          congr 1
          -- We show that the number of I with counts w is multinomial A w.
          -- We construct a bijection to functions Fin (2*m) → A.
          let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
            Equiv.trans (Equiv.piCurry (fun _ ↦ ι) (Fin m) (Fin 2))
              (Equiv.piCongrLeft (fun _ ↦ ι) (finProdFinEquiv (Fin m) (Fin 2)))
          rw [← card_filter_piFinset_sum_eq_multinomial A _ _ (mem_piAntidiag.1 hw)]
          rw [← card_map e, map_filter]
          congr 1
          ext f
          simp only [mem_map, mem_piFinset, mem_filter, and_congr_right_iff]
          intro hf
          -- The bijection e preserves the counts.
          simp only [ψ, e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piCurry_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft_apply,
            Fintype.card, Fintype.sum_prod_type]
          rfl
        · rw [sum_empty, sum_empty]
      · intro I hI
        rw [mem_piAntidiag]
        simp_rw [ψ, sum_add_distrib]
        rw [← card_eq_sum_ones, ← card_eq_sum_ones]
        simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hI
        trans (Finset.univ.filter (fun k ↦ (I k).1 ∈ A)).card + (Finset.univ.filter (fun k ↦ (I k).2 ∈ A)).card
        · congr 1 <;> rw [card_eq_sum_ones, sum_filter] <;> apply sum_congr rfl <;> intro x _ <;>
          rw [sum_comm] <;> simp
        · rw [filter_true_of_mem (fun k ↦ (hI k).1), filter_true_of_mem (fun k ↦ (hI k).2), card_fin, card_fin]
          rfl

let count (I : Fin m → ι × ι) (i : ι) := #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i}
      rw [← Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun I ↦ count I)]
      · congr 1
        refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
        rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
        congr 1
        let K := Fin m × Fin 2
        let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (K → ι) :=
        { toFun := fun I x ↦ if x.2 = 0 then (I x.1).1 else (I x.1).2
          invFun := fun f k ↦ (f (k, 0), f (k, 1))
          left_inv := fun I ↦ by ext k; simp
          right_inv := fun f ↦ by ext ⟨k, i⟩; cases i using Fin.cases <;> simp }
        have h_bij : (A ×ˢ A ^^ m).map e.toEmbedding = Fintype.piFinset fun _ : K ↦ A := by
          ext f
          simp only [mem_map_equiv, mem_piFinset, mem_product, K]
          constructor
          · rintro ⟨I, hI, rfl⟩ x
            specialize hI x.1
            simp only [mem_product] at hI
            split_ifs <;> tauto
          · intro hf
            refine ⟨e.symm f, ?_, e.apply_symm_apply f⟩
            intro k
            simp only [e, mem_product]
            exact ⟨hf (k, 0), hf (k, 1)⟩
        rw [← Finset.card_map e.toEmbedding, h_bij]
        convert card_filter_piFinset_const_eq_multinomial A w _ using 2
        · refine Finset.card_congr (Equiv.refl _) ?_
          intro f hf
          simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_filter, Equiv.refl_apply] at hf ⊢
          congr! 1
          ext i
          simp only [count, e, K]
          rw [← Finset.sum_boole, ← Finset.sum_boole, ← Finset.sum_boole]
          simp only [Fintype.sum_prod_type, Fin.sum_univ_two, if_true, if_false]
        · simp [K, mul_comm]; exact (mem_piAntidiag.1 hw).1
      · intro I hI
        simp only [mem_piAntidiag]
        refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
        · simp only [count, sum_add_distrib]
          rw [sum_card_fiberwise, sum_card_fiberwise]
          simp [mul_comm]
        · simpa [EvenIndex, count] using (mem_filter.1 hI).2

rw [← (Equiv.piProdEquiv (fun _ ↦ ι) (fun _ ↦ ι)).sum_comp,
          ← (Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow _ _ _).symm.sum_comp,
          ← (finSumFinEquiv (m := m) (n := m)).sum_comp,
          ← (finCongr (two_mul m).symm).sum_comp]
      let count (f : Fin (2 * m) → ι) (i : ι) := #{k | f k = i}
      have h_maps : ∀ f ∈ A ^^ (2 * m), count f ∈ piAntidiag A (2 * m) := fun f hf ↦ by
        rw [mem_piAntidiag]
        exact ⟨by simp [count, sum_card_fiberwise], fun i hi ↦
          by rw [count, card_eq_zero, filter_eq_empty_iff]; intro x hx; exact hi (mem_piFinset.1 hf x)⟩
      rw [← Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun f _ ↦ h_maps f) _]
      refine Finset.sum_bij_ne_zero (fun w _ _ ↦ w) (fun _ _ _ ↦ rfl)
        (fun _ _ _ _ _ ↦ rfl) (fun _ _ _ ↦ rfl) (fun w hw hnz ↦ ?_)
      · rw [mem_filter] at hw
        have heven : ∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ w i := by
          contrapose! hnz
          exact Finset.sum_eq_zero fun f hf ↦ (hnz (hf.2 _ (hw.2 _))).elim
        simp only [heven, and_true, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
        congr 1
        rw [← card_piFinset_sum_eq_multinomial A w, Finset.filter_congr]
        · intro f hf; simp only [mem_filter] at hf; rw [hf.2]
          simp only [heven, true_and]; rfl
        · exact (mem_piAntidiag.1 hw.1).1.symm

let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
        (Equiv.piCongrRight (fun _ ↦ (finTwoArrowEquiv (fun _ ↦ ι)).symm)).trans <|
        (Equiv.piCurry _ _ _).trans <|
        (finProdFinEquiv m 2).arrowCongr (Equiv.refl ι)
      rw [Finset.sum_equiv e]
      · let counts (f : Fin (2 * m) → ι) i := (A ^^ (2 * m)).count f i
        rw [← Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun f ↦ counts f) (piAntidiag A (2 * m))]
        · refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
          by_cases h_even : ∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ w i
          · rw [Finset.sum_filter_of_true, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
            · rw [card_filter_piFinset_eq_multinomial _ _ _ (mem_piAntidiag.1 hw)]
            · intro f hf i hi; rw [mem_filter] at hf; rw [← hf.2]; exact h_even i hi
          · rw [Finset.sum_filter_of_false]; simp; intro f hf; contrapose! h_even
            obtain ⟨i, hi, h⟩ := h_even; use i, hi; rw [← hf.2] at h; exact h
        · intro f hf; rw [mem_piAntidiag]; simp only [mem_piFinset] at hf
          exact Finset.card_eq_sum_ones _
      · intro I; simp [e, mem_piFinset, mem_product, forall_and]
        constructor
        · rintro ⟨h1, h2⟩ x; have := finProdFinEquiv m 2 x; revert this
          match x with | ⟨k, 0⟩ => exact h1 k | ⟨k, 1⟩ => exact h2 k
        · intro h; constructor <;> intro k <;> apply h
      · intro I; simp [e, EvenIndex]; congr! 2 with i
        simp [Pi.count, ← Finset.card_sum]
        rw [Finset.sum_equiv (finProdFinEquiv m 2).symm]
        simp [Finset.filter_eq', ← Finset.sum_filter, Finset.sum_add_distrib]

let e : (Fin (2 * m) → ι) ≃ (Fin m → ι × ι) :=
        (Equiv.piCongrLeft (fun _ ↦ ι) Fin.finSumFinEquiv).trans
          ((Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow _ _ _).trans (Equiv.arrowProdEquivProdArrow _ _ _ _))
      have h_count : ∀ f i, #{k | (e f k).1 = i} + #{k | (e f k).2 = i} = count f i := by
        intro f i
        simp only [count, e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.arrowProdEquivProdArrow_apply,
          Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft_apply, Sum.elim_apply]
        rw [← Fintype.card_sum, ← Fintype.card_congr Fin.finSumFinEquiv]
        simp only [Equiv.apply_symm_apply]
      rw [← Finset.sum_equiv e]
      · simp only [mem_piAntidiag]
        rw [Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun f i ↦ count f i) (piAntidiag A (2 * m))]
        · refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
          simp only [mem_filter, mem_piAntidiag] at hw
          rw [Finset.sum_const, ← card_filter_count_eq_multinomial A _ w hw.1, Nat.cast_natCast]
          congr 1
          refine Finset.filter_congr fun f hf ↦ ?_
          simp only [h_count]
          exact ⟨fun h ↦ h.2, fun h ↦ ⟨fun i ↦ by rw [h]; exact (mem_filter.mp hw).1 i, h⟩⟩
        · intro f hf
          rw [mem_piAntidiag]
          exact ⟨sum_count_eq_card f, fun i h ↦ (mem_piFinset.mp hf _ (mem_filter.mp h).1)⟩
      · intro f hf
        simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hf ⊢
        intro k
        simp only [e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.arrowProdEquivProdArrow_apply,
          Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft_apply, Sum.elim_apply]
        constructor <;> apply hf
      · intro f hf; simp only [h_count]
      · intro f hf; congr; ext i; rw [h_count]

let n := 2 * m
      let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin n → ι) :=
        (Equiv.piCongrRight (fun _ ↦ Equiv.finTwoArrowEquiv ι)).trans <|
        (Equiv.piCurry _ _ _).trans <|
        Equiv.piCongrLeft _ (finProdFinEquiv m).symm
      rw [← Finset.sum_equiv e]
      · rw [Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun f i ↦ #{k | f k = i}) (piAntidiag A n)]
        · apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
          intro w hw
          simp only [mem_piAntidiag] at hw
          rw [Finset.sum_filter]
          split_ifs with h_even
          · rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun _ _ ↦ rfl), Finset.filter_true_of_mem]
            · rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, multinomial_filter_piFinset_eq w]
            · intro f hf
              simp only [mem_filter] at hf
              intro i _
              rw [← hf.2]
              exact h_even i
          · rw [Finset.filter_false_of_mem, Finset.sum_empty, zero_mul]
            intro f hf
            simp only [mem_filter] at hf
            intro h
            refine h_even (fun i _ ↦ ?_)
            rw [← hf.2]
            exact h i
        · intro f hf
          rw [mem_piAntidiag]
          refine ⟨fun i hi ↦ ?_, ?_⟩
          · rw [← card_pos] at hi
            exact (mem_piFinset.1 hf) _ (exists_mem_of_nonempty (nonempty_of_pos_multiset_card hi)).2
          · simp only [n, card_eq_sum_ones, sum_boole, Finset.sum_const, card_fin]
      · intro I
        simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product]
        refine ⟨fun h k ↦ ?_, fun h k ↦ ?_⟩
        · let p := finProdFinEquiv m k
          specialize h p.1
          simp only [e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft_apply, Equiv.symm_apply_apply,
            Equiv.piCurry_apply, Equiv.piCongrRight_apply, Equiv.finTwoArrowEquiv_apply]
          rcases p with ⟨k, a | a⟩ <;> simpa using h
        · simp only [e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft_apply, Equiv.piCurry_apply,
            Equiv.piCongrRight_apply, Equiv.finTwoArrowEquiv_apply] at h 
          exact ⟨h _, h _⟩
      · intro I hI
        dsimp
        congr 1
        · simp only [EvenIndex]
          congr! 2 with i
          simp only [e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft_apply, Equiv.piCurry_apply,
            Equiv.piCongrRight_apply, Equiv.finTwoArrowEquiv_apply]
          rw [← card_sum, ← Finset.univ_product_univ, ← Fin.univ_pi_univ_eq_univ]
          exact card_congr (finProdFinEquiv m).symm
        · congr! 2 with i
          simp only [e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft_apply, Equiv.piCurry_apply,
            Equiv.piCongrRight_apply, Equiv.finTwoArrowEquiv_apply]
          rw [← card_sum, ← Finset.univ_product_univ, ← Fin.univ_pi_univ_eq_univ]
          exact card_congr (finProdFinEquiv m).symm

have : DecidableEq (ι → ℕ) := Classical.decEq _
      let key (I : Fin m → ι × ι) (i : ι) := #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i}
      rw [← sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to key ((piAntidiag A (2 * m)).filter fun w ↦ ∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ w i)]
      · refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun w H ↦ ?_
        rw [sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
        congr 1
        let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
          (Equiv.piProd _ _ _).trans <| (Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow _ _ _).symm.trans <|
          Equiv.piCongrLeft' _ finSumFinEquiv
        have h_count (I : Fin m → ι × ι) (i : ι) : #{k | e I k = i} = key I i := by
          simp only [key, e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piProd_apply,
            Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_symm_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft'_apply]
          rw [← Fintype.card_congr finSumFinEquiv, Fintype.card_sum]
          congr 1 <;> { apply Fintype.card_congr; refine Equiv.Set.ofEq ?_; ext; simp }
        have h_mem (I : Fin m → ι × ι) : (∀ k, e I k ∈ A) ↔ I ∈ A ×ˢ A ^^ m := by
          simp_rw [mem_piFinset, mem_product, Equiv.forall_congr_left, Sum.forall, forall_and]
        rw [← card_piFinset_card_eq_multinomial A _ w (mem_piAntidiag.1 (mem_filter.1 H).1).1]
        apply Fintype.card_congr
        refine (e.subtypeEquiv ?_).trans ?_
        · exact fun I ↦ by rw [h_mem, ← h_count]; rfl
        · exact Equiv.Set.ofEq (by ext; simp)
      · intro I hI
        simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset, mem_product, forall_and] at hI 
        rw [mem_filter, mem_piAntidiag]
        refine ⟨⟨?_, fun i ↦ ?_⟩, hI.2⟩
        · rw [← Fintype.card_eq_sum_card_fiberwise (fun k ↦ (I k).1) _ (fun k ↦ (hI.1 k).1),
              ← Fintype.card_eq_sum_card_fiberwise (fun k ↦ (I k).2) _ (fun k ↦ (hI.1 k).2)]
          simp [key, sum_add_distrib, two_mul]
        · rw [Function.mem_support, ne_eq, ← pos_iff_ne_zero]
          intro h_pos
          simp [key] at h_pos
          obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ | ⟨k, rfl⟩ := by simpa [pos_iff_ne_zero] using h_pos
          · exact (hI.1 k).1
          · exact (hI.1 k).2

let n := 2 * m
      let signs := Fintype.piFinset fun _ : A ↦ ({-1, 1} : Finset ℝ)
      have sum_signs (f : A → ℝ) :
          ∑ ε ∈ signs, (∑ i ∈ A, ε i * f i) ^ n =
            signs.card * ∑ w ∈ piAntidiag A n with ∀ i ∈ A, Even (w i),
              multinomial A w * ∏ i ∈ A, f i ^ w i := by
        simp_rw [sum_pow, mul_pow, sum_comm (s := signs), mul_sum]
        refine sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
        rw [← mul_assoc, mul_right_comm, mul_right_inj' (by positivity)]
        simp_rw [prod_mul_distrib, prod_pow, sum_product, univ_eq_attach, ← prod_sum]
        convert_to (∏ i ∈ A, if Even (w i) then 2 else 0) * _ = _
        · congr with i; simp [mem_attach, sum_pair, neg_pow, one_pow]; split_ifs <;> simp_all [even_iff_not_odd]
        · rw [prod_ite, prod_const, prod_const, prod_eq_zero_iff]
          simp only [mem_filter, not_and, not_forall, exists_prop]
          by_cases h : ∀ i ∈ A, Even (w i)
          · simp [h, card_attach, filter_eq_self.2 h, signs, card_piFinset]
          · simp [h]
      have LHS_eq :
          ∑ ε ∈ signs, ∫ ω, (∑ i ∈ A, ε i * ‖X i ω‖) ^ n ∂μ =
            signs.card * ∑ I ∈ A ×ˢ A ^^ m with EvenIndex I,
              ∫ ω, ∏ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ (#{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i}) ∂μ := by
        simp_rw [integral_sum signs, ← Finset.sum_pow', integral_finset_sum _ integrable_prod_norm_X,
          sum_comm (s := signs), ← mul_sum]
        refine sum_congr rfl fun I hI ↦ ?_
        congr 1
        simp_rw [prod_mul_distrib, prod_pow, sum_product, univ_eq_attach, ← prod_sum]
        convert_to (∏ i ∈ A, if Even (#{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i}) then 2 else 0) = _
        · congr with i; simp [mem_attach, sum_pair, neg_pow, one_pow]; split_ifs <;> simp_all [even_iff_not_odd]
        · rw [prod_ite, prod_const, prod_const]; by_cases h : EvenIndex I
          · simp [h, card_attach, filter_eq_self.2 h, signs, card_piFinset]
          · simp [h, EvenIndex] at h; simp [h, prod_eq_zero_iff]
      rw [← mul_right_inj' (Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 (Fintype.card_ne_zero : signs.card ≠ 0))]
      simp_rw [integral_mul_left, ← sum_signs fun i ↦ ‖X i _‖, integral_sum signs]
      exact LHS_eq

let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
        (Equiv.piProd _ _ _).trans <| Equiv.piSumProd.symm.trans <|
        Equiv.piCongrLeft' _ (finSumFinEquiv.trans (finCongr (two_mul m).symm))
      rw [Finset.sum_equiv e]
      · rw [← Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun f ↦ count f) (piAntidiag A (2 * m))]
        · refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
          rw [mem_piAntidiag] at hw
          split_ifs with h_even
          · simp_rw [sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
            rw [card_filter_piFinset_eq_multinomial _ _ hw.1]
          · refine sum_empty fun f hf ↦ ?_
            simp only [mem_filter] at hf
            apply h_even
            rw [← hf.1]
            exact hf.2
        · intro f hf
          rw [mem_piAntidiag]
          refine ⟨?_, fun i hi ↦ ?_⟩
          · rw [sum_count, ← Finset.card_piFinset_const, Fintype.card_fin]
          · simp only [mem_piFinset] at hf
            contrapose! hi
            rw [count_eq_zero]
            intro x
            exact fun h => hi (h ▸ hf x)
      · intro I
        simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product, e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piProd_apply,
          Equiv.piSumProd_symm_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft'_apply, finSumFinEquiv_apply,
          finCongr_apply, Sum.elim_comp_cast]
        simp only [Sum.elim_lam_const_lam_const, comp_apply]
        simp only [forall_and]
        refine ⟨fun h x ↦ ?_, fun h ↦ ⟨fun k ↦ ?_, fun k ↦ ?_⟩⟩
        · obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ | ⟨k, rfl⟩ := finSumFinEquiv.symm.surjective (finCongr (two_mul m) x) <;>
            simp [h]
        · simpa using h (finCongr (two_mul m).symm (finSumFinEquiv (Sum.inl k)))
        · simpa using h (finCongr (two_mul m).symm (finSumFinEquiv (Sum.inr k)))
      · intro I hI
        dsimp [EvenIndex]
        congr! with i
        simp only [count, e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piProd_apply,
          Equiv.piSumProd_symm_apply, Equiv.piCongrLeft'_apply, finSumFinEquiv_apply,
          finCongr_apply, Sum.elim_comp_cast, Sum.elim_lam_const_lam_const, comp_apply]
        -- key I i = count (e I) i
        rw [← card_sum_fiberwise_eq_card_univ, univ_sum_type, card_sum,
          filter_sum, card_map, card_map]
        rfl
      · rfl

let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
        (Equiv.finProdFinEquiv m).symm.trans (Equiv.piCurry _ _ _).symm
      rw [← (e.piCongrLeft (fun _ ↦ A)).sum_comp]
      simp_rw [← Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun f ↦ count f) (fun f hf ↦ mem_piAntidiag.2 ⟨hf, rfl⟩)]
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
      rw [mem_piAntidiag] at hw
      split_ifs with h
      · rw [Finset.sum_filter, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_piFinset_const_of_count _ _ _ hw.1]
        · congr 1 with ω
          rw [prod_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun _ _ ↦ _) (by simpa using hw.1)]
        · intro f hf
          simp only [mem_filter] at hf
          simp only [EvenIndex, e, Equiv.trans_symm, Equiv.symm_symm, Equiv.piCurry_apply,
            Equiv.finProdFinEquiv_symm_apply, count]
          convert h using 2 with i
          rw [← hf.2]
          simp only [Fintype.card_ofFinset, mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and]
          apply Fintype.card_congr
          exact (Equiv.finProdFinEquiv m).trans (Equiv.piCurry _ _ _)
      · apply Finset.sum_empty
        intro f hf
        simp only [mem_filter, EvenIndex, e, Equiv.trans_symm, Equiv.symm_symm,
            Equiv.piCurry_apply, Equiv.finProdFinEquiv_symm_apply, count] at hf
        apply h
        intro i hi
        rw [← hf.1.2]
        convert hf.2 i hi
        simp only [Fintype.card_ofFinset, mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and]
        apply Fintype.card_congr
        exact (Equiv.finProdFinEquiv m).trans (Equiv.piCurry _ _ _)

rw [Finset.sum_integral]
      congr with ω
      let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin m ⊕ Fin m → ι) :=
        { toFun := fun I x ↦ Sum.recOn x (fun k ↦ (I k).1) (fun k ↦ (I k).2)
          invFun := fun f k ↦ (f (Sum.inl k), f (Sum.inr k))
          left_inv := fun I ↦ by ext k; simp
          right_inv := fun f ↦ by ext x; cases x <;> simp }
      rw [← Finset.sum_equiv e (fun f i ↦ #{x | f x = i}) (fun I ↦ by simp) (fun I ↦ by simp)]
      · rw [← Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun f i ↦ #{x | f x = i}) (piAntidiag A (2 * m))]
        · congr with w
          rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
          congr 1
          convert Finset.card_filter_piFinset_const_eq_multinomial A w (mem_piAntidiag.mp w.2) using 1
          rw [Fintype.card_sum, Fintype.card_fin]
        · intro f hf
          rw [mem_piAntidiag, Fintype.card_sum, Fintype.card_fin]
          exact sum_card_fiber_eq _ _
      · intro I
        congr! with i
        simp only [e, Finset.univ_sum_type, Finset.filter_sum, Finset.card_disjoint_union,
          Finset.card_map, Function.Embedding.coeFn_mk]

rw [Finset.sum_equiv Equiv.piProdEquiv]
      · let e : (Fin (2 * m) → ι) ≃ (Fin m → ι) × (Fin m → ι) :=
          (Equiv.arrowCongr Fin.finSumFinEquiv (Equiv.refl ι)).trans (Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow _ _ _)
        rw [Finset.sum_equiv e.symm]
        · rw [Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun f ↦ fun i ↦ #{k | f k = i}) _]
          · refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
            simp only [mem_piAntidiag] at hw
            rw [Finset.sum_filter]
            split_ifs with h_even
            · rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, Finset.card_piFinset_filter_count_eq_multinomial]
              · intro i hi; exact hw.1 _ hi
              · rw [← hw.2, two_mul]
            · refine (Finset.sum_eq_zero fun f hf ↦ ?_).symm
              simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset] at hf
              obtain ⟨i, hi, h_odd⟩ : ∃ i ∈ A, Odd (w i) := by
                simpa [EvenIndex, -not_forall] using h_even
              have := hf.2 i hi
              rw [hf.1] at this
              exact (Nat.odd_iff_not_even.mp h_odd this).elim
          · intro f hf
            simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset] at hf
            simp only [mem_piAntidiag]
            refine ⟨fun i hi ↦ (count_eq_zero_of_not_mem (mt (hf.1 ·) (not_mem_of_mem_not_mem · hi))).symm, ?_⟩
            rw [sum_card_filter_eq_card_pi, Fintype.card_fin]
        · intro f
          simp only [mem_piFinset, Equiv.symm_apply_apply, Sum.forall, Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_apply,
            Equiv.arrowCongr_apply, Fin.finSumFinEquiv_symm_apply]
        · intro x hx
          simp only [EvenIndex, Equiv.symm_apply_apply]
          congr! with i
          rw [← Fintype.card_sum, ← Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.filterPreimage Fin.finSumFinEquiv _)]
          simp only [Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_symm_apply, Equiv.arrowCongr_symm_apply,
            Equiv.refl_symm, Equiv.refl_apply, Sum.elim_comp_inl, Sum.elim_comp_inr]
          rfl
        · intro x hx
          congr! 2 with ω
          prod_eq_pow
          congr! 2 with i
          rw [← Fintype.card_sum, ← Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.filterPreimage Fin.finSumFinEquiv _)]
          simp only [Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_symm_apply, Equiv.arrowCongr_symm_apply,
            Equiv.refl_symm, Equiv.refl_apply, Sum.elim_comp_inl, Sum.elim_comp_inr]
          rfl
      · intro x
        simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product, Equiv.piProdEquiv_apply, Prod.forall]
        exact ⟨fun h ↦ ⟨fun i ↦ (h i).1, fun i ↦ (h i).2⟩, fun h i ↦ ⟨h.1 i, h.2 i⟩⟩
      · intro I hI; rfl
      · intro I hI; rfl

let counts (I : Fin m → ι × ι) (i : ι) := #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i}
      rw [← Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun I ↦ counts I) (piAntidiag A (2 * m))]
      · refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
        rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
        congr 1
        let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
          (Equiv.piProdEquivProdPi (fun _ ↦ ι) (fun _ ↦ ι)).trans
            ((Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow _ _ _).symm.trans
              (Equiv.piCongrLeft _ Equiv.finSumFinEquiv))
        rw [← card_piFinset_const_of_count_eq_multinomial A _ w hw, ← Finset.card_map e]
        refine Finset.card_congr (fun I _ ↦ e I) (fun I hI ↦ ?_) (fun I _ ↦ e I) (fun I _ ↦ e I)
        · simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset] at hI ⊢
          simp only [counts, count, e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piProdEquivProdPi_apply,
            Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_symm_apply_inl,
            Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_symm_apply_inr, Equiv.piCongrLeft_apply,
            Equiv.finSumFinEquiv_apply_left, Equiv.finSumFinEquiv_apply_right,
            ← card_sum_eq_card_inl_add_card_inr] at hI ⊢
          exact hI
        · intro; simp
        · intro; simp
        · intro f hf
          simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset, mem_map, exists_exists_and_eq_and] at hf ⊢
          use e.symm f
          simp only [counts, count, e, Equiv.symm_apply_apply, Equiv.trans_apply,
            Equiv.piProdEquivProdPi_apply, Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_symm_apply_inl,
            Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_symm_apply_inr, Equiv.piCongrLeft_apply,
            Equiv.finSumFinEquiv_apply_left, Equiv.finSumFinEquiv_apply_right,
            ← card_sum_eq_card_inl_add_card_inr] at hf ⊢
          exact hf
      · intro I hI
        simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hI
        rw [mem_piAntidiag]
        refine ⟨fun i hi ↦ ?_, ?_⟩
        · simp only [counts, ne_eq, add_eq_zero, card_eq_zero, filter_eq_empty_iff, not_mem_univ,
            forall_const, false_implies, not_true_eq_false] at hi
          obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := Classical.not_forall.mp hi.1
          exact (hI k).1
        · simp [counts, sum_add_distrib, card_eq_sum_ones, sum_filter]
          rw [← sum_product', ← sum_product']
          simp

let e : (Fin m → A ×ˢ A) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → A) :=
        Equiv.piProdEquivProdPi.trans <|
        (Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow _ _ _).symm.trans <|
        finSumFinEquiv.arrowCongr (Equiv.refl _)
      have h I i : #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i} = count (e I) i := by
        simp [e, count, Finset.card_filter, ← Finset.card_sum, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]; rfl
      rw [← Fintype.sum_equiv e]
      simp_rw [← Finset.sum_piFinset_map_count, EvenIndex]
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun I _ ↦ ?_
      simp_rw [h]

let key (I : Fin m → ι × ι) (i : ι) := #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i}
      rw [← sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun I ↦ key I)]
      · apply sum_congr rfl
        intro w hw
        simp only [mem_piAntidiag] at hw
        rw [sum_mul, integral_sum]
        · simp_rw [mul_comm (multinomial A w), integral_mul_left]
          apply sum_congr _ fun I hI ↦ rfl
          rw [filter_congr (fun I hI ↦ by simp [EvenIndex, hI, hw.2, Nat.Even, Dvd.dvd])]
          split_ifs with he
          · rw [filter_true_of_mem (fun _ _ ↦ trivial), card_eq_sum_ones, Nat.cast_sum, Nat.cast_one, sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_one]
            let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
              (Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow _ _ _).symm.trans (Equiv.arrowCongr finSumFinEquiv (Equiv.refl _))
            have h_bij : ∀ I, key I = w ↔ ∀ i, (univ.filter fun k ↦ e I k = i).card = w i := by
              intro I; ext i; simp [key, e, Fintype.card_sum, finSumFinEquiv]; rfl
            rw [← Finset.card_map e.toEmbedding, map_filter]
            have h_im : (A ×ˢ A ^^ m).map e.toEmbedding = A ^^ (2 * m) := by
              ext f; simp [mem_map, mem_piFinset, mem_product]
              constructor
              · rintro ⟨I, hI, rfl⟩ x
                cases (finSumFinEquiv.symm x) <;> simpa using (mem_piFinset.1 hI _)
              · intro hf; refine ⟨e.symm f, ?_, by simp⟩
                intro k; simp; constructor <;> apply hf
            rw [h_im]
            simp_rw [h_bij]
            convert Finset.card_piFinset_of_sum_eq w hw.1
            ext f; simp
          · rw [filter_false_of_mem, card_empty, Nat.cast_zero, zero_mul]
            intro I hI hE; apply he; intro i hi
            specialize hE i hi
            rwa [hI] at hE
        · intro _ _; exact Integrable.const _ _
      · intro I hI
        simp only [mem_piAntidiag]
        constructor
        · simp_rw [key, sum_add_distrib, card_eq_sum_ones, sum_filter]
          rw [← sum_product', ← sum_product', Finset.sum_comm, Finset.sum_comm _ _ (Fin m)]
          simp only [sum_ite_eq]
          simp [mem_piFinset.1 hI]
        · intro i hi
          simp only [key]
          by_contra h
          rw [not_mem_range_self] at h
          have h1 : ∀ k, (I k).1 ≠ i := fun k hk => h (hk ▸ (mem_piFinset.1 hI k).1)
          have h2 : ∀ k, (I k).2 ≠ i := fun k hk => h (hk ▸ (mem_piFinset.1 hI k).2)
          simp [h1, h2]

let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
        Equiv.piProdEquiv.trans (Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow.trans
          (finSumFinEquiv.symm.trans (finCongr (two_mul m).symm)))
      rw [← Finset.sum_equiv e]
      · rw [Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun f i ↦ #{k | f k = i})]
        · refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
          rw [Finset.sum_const, Nat.card_filter_piFinset_const_eq_multinomial _ _ (by simpa using hw), nsmul_eq_mul]
        · intro f hf
          rw [Finset.mem_piAntidiag]
          simp only [mem_piFinset] at hf
          refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
          · rw [← Fintype.card_fin (2 * m), ← Finset.card_univ, ← sum_card_fiberwise_eq_card_finset_in_univ]
            rfl
            intro x hx; exact hf _ (mem_univ _)
          · intro i hi
            apply card_eq_zero_of_forall_not_mem
            intro x hx
            exact hi (hf x (mem_univ _) ▸ hx)
      · intro I
        simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset, mem_product, and_congr_left_iff, EvenIndex]
        have h_count : ∀ i, #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i} = #{x | (e I) x = i} := by
          intro i
          simp only [e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piProdEquiv_apply, Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_apply, Equiv.symm_symm, Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_symm_apply]
          rw [← card_sum, ← Fintype.card_congr (finSumFinEquiv.symm.trans (finCongr (two_mul m).symm))]
          simp
        simp_rw [h_count, Finset.card_filter]; rfl
      · intro I
        congr! 1 with ω
        have h_count : ∀ i, #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i} = #{x | (e I) x = i} := by
          intro i
          simp only [e, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.piProdEquiv_apply, Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_apply, Equiv.symm_symm, Equiv.sumArrowEquivProdArrow_symm_apply]
          rw [← card_sum, ← Fintype.card_congr (finSumFinEquiv.symm.trans (finCongr (two_mul m).symm))]
          simp
        simp_rw [h_count]

rw [← Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun I i ↦ #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i}) _]
      · congr with w
        split_ifs with hw
        · rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, ← Nat.cast_mul]
          congr 1
          let e : (Fin (2 * m) → ι) ≃ (Fin m → ι × ι) :=
             ((finTwoMulEquiv.symm.trans (Equiv.prodComm _ _)).arrowCongr (Equiv.refl ι)).trans (Equiv.piCurry _)
          rw [← Finset.card_map e.symm, Finset.map_filter]
          convert Finset.card_piFinset_const_sum_eq_multinomial A w (mem_piAntidiag.1 w.2).2 using 2
          · ext f
            simp only [Function.comp_apply, Equiv.symm_apply_apply, mem_piFinset, mem_product]
            constructor <;> intro h <;> simpa [e] using h
          · ext f
            simp only [Function.comp_apply, Equiv.symm_apply_apply]
            congr 1
            simp_rw [count_eq_card_filter_eq, ← Fintype.card_sum]
            apply Fintype.card_congr
            exact (Equiv.sigmaCongrRight (fun _ => (Equiv.sumEquivSigmaBool _ _).symm)).trans (e.sigmaCongr (Equiv.refl _)).symm
        · refine Finset.sum_empty (fun I hI ↦ ?_)
          simp [EvenIndex] at hI
          rw [hI] at hw
          contradiction
      · intro I _
        apply mem_piAntidiag.2
        simp [sum_add_distrib, ← card_fin m, mul_comm 2]

let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
        (Equiv.piCongrRight fun _ ↦ finTwoArrowEquiv.symm).trans <|
        (Equiv.piCurry _ _ _).trans <|
        (finProdFinEquiv m 2).symm.arrowCongr (Equiv.refl _)
      have h_count : ∀ I i, #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i} = #{k | e I k = i} := by
        intro I i
        simp [e, ← Finset.card_sum, Fintype.card_congr (finProdFinEquiv m 2)]
      rw [Finset.sum_equiv e]
      · rw [← Finset.sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun J ↦ fun i ↦ #{k | J k = i})]
        · apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
          intro w hw
          rw [mem_piAntidiag] at hw
          rw [Finset.sum_filter]
          split_ifs with h_even
          · rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, Finset.card_filter]
            congr 1
            · rw [← Finset.card_piFinset_eq_multinomial _ _ _ hw]
              congr; ext; simp [mem_piFinset]
            · congr! with ω i
          · apply Finset.sum_eq_zero
            intro J hJ
            simp only [mem_filter] at hJ
            exact (h_even fun i _ ↦ by rw [← hJ.2]; simpa [EvenIndex, h_count] using hJ.1 i).elim
        · intro J hJ; rw [mem_piAntidiag]
          exact card_eq_of_maps_to (by simpa using hJ)
      · intro J
        simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product]
        simp [e, ← e.symm.forall_congr_left]
      · intro J hJ
        simp only [mem_piFinset] at hJ
        congr 1
        · simp [EvenIndex]
          apply forall_congr'; intro i
          apply forall_congr'; intro _
          rw [h_count]
        · congr! with ω i
          rw [h_count]
